name: Butterfinger Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the cake in a 9x13 pan according to package directions.
2. While the cake is still hot, pour butterscotch topping over it and poke small holes so that the topping can soak in.
3. Allow the cake to cool completely.
4. Crush Butterfinger bars. Reserve half of one bar. Mix the rest with Cool Whip and pecans.
5. Spread mixture over the cooled cake and top with reserved Butterfinger pieces.
6. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
